name: The Muslims were asked to give up all those polytheistic and pagan practices that had
introduction:
arisen among the Arabs during the Age of Ignorance and which ran alongside the worship
of God thereby adulterating the latter. They were required to consecrate their worship and
adoration to God alone according to the guidance He had now revealed through the
Prophet.
